properties.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry into bid() while s_entered is true.
properties.assertion: forall call bid(): s_entered == true at entry => revert ReentrantCall()

properties.text: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling assetOut creates callback window; callback must not alter auction state.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt, data): state(auction) unchanged between safeTransfer(out) and safeTransferFrom(in)

properties.text: Callback execution between asset transfer and assetOut pull must not enable double-spend or state manipulation.
properties.assertion: forall bid with data.length>0: auctionCallback() cannot re-enter bid() or modify auctionStarts/balances

properties.text: bid() must revert if no live auction exists for the asset (auctionStart==0 or expired).
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): auctionStart==0 OR elapsed>duration => revert InvalidAuction()

properties.text: bid() must revert if bidUsdValue is below minBidUsdValue threshold.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): bidUsdValue < s_minBidUsdValue => revert BidValueTooLow()

properties.text: bid() must revert if amount exceeds contract's available balance for the asset.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt): amt > availableBalance => revert BidAmountTooHigh()

properties.text: priceMultiplier must decay linearly from startingPriceMultiplier to endingPriceMultiplier over auctionDuration.
properties.assertion: multiplier = start - (start - end) * min(elapsed, duration) / duration; multiplier >= end

properties.text: elapsedTime must be clamped to auctionDuration so multiplier never goes below endingPriceMultiplier.
properties.assertion: elapsedTime = min(elapsedTime, auctionDuration); multiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier

properties.text: Rounding in _getAssetOutAmount must favor the protocol (mulDivUp for USD, mulWadUp for multiplier).
properties.assertion: assetOutAmount computed via mulDivUp and mulWadUp; bidder receives <= fair market value

properties.text: No auction can be started for an asset that already has a live auction.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(asset): auctionStarts[asset] != 0 => revert LiveAuction()

properties.text: Asset out tokens received via performUpkeep must be forwarded to assetOutReceiver, not auctioned.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset == assetOut => safeTransfer(asset, assetOutReceiver, balance)

properties.text: Ended auctions must have been previously started (auctionStarts != 0) before _onAuctionEnd is called.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd(asset): auctionStarts[asset] != 0 (validated before call)

properties.text: On auction end, remaining auctioned asset must be returned to feeAggregator and assetOut forwarded to receiver.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd: assetBalance>0 => transfer(asset, feeAgg); outBalance>0 => transfer(out, receiver)

properties.text: Auction ended condition must trigger when duration elapsed OR balance drops below minAuctionSizeUsd.
properties.assertion: auctionEnded(asset) iff (elapsed > duration) OR (balanceUsd < minAuctionSizeUsd)

properties.text: No new auctions started if assetOut price is invalid (stale or zero).
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep: !isAssetOutPriceValid => eligibleAssetsIdx = 0

properties.text: No configuration changes (assetOut, receiver, feeAggregator, params) allowed during live auctions.
properties.assertion: forall config_update: liveAuctionExists => revert LiveAuction()

properties.text: startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier >= minPriceMultiplier must hold for all asset params.
properties.assertion: forall assetParams: startMul >= endMul >= i_minPriceMultiplier AND endMul > 0

properties.text: Asset decimals in params must match on-chain ERC20 decimals; mismatch reverts.
properties.assertion: forall _applyAssetParamsUpdates(add): params.decimals != ERC20(asset).decimals() => revert

properties.text: Only AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE can call performUpkeep; unauthorized callers must be rejected.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(caller): !hasRole(AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE, caller) => revert

properties.text: s_entered must be reset to false after bid() completes, even if callback reverts.
properties.assertion: forall bid() completion: s_entered == false (unlock always executes)

properties.text: safeTransferFrom must pull exactly assetOutAmount from bidder after asset transfer out.
properties.assertion: forall bid: balanceOf(assetOut, contract) increases by exactly assetOutAmount after pull

properties.text: Old assetOut params must be deleted when assetOut is changed to prevent stale configuration.
properties.assertion: forall _setAssetOut(newOut): delete s_assetParams[oldOut] executed

properties.text: After bid() settles, contract must hold transferred assetOut and bidder must hold transferred asset.
properties.assertion: post bid: bidder.balance(asset) += amount AND contract.balance(assetOut) += assetOutAmount

properties.text: After performUpkeep starts auction, auctionStarts[asset] must equal block.timestamp.
properties.assertion: post performUpkeep(start): auctionStarts[asset] == block.timestamp

properties.text: After _onAuctionEnd, auctionStarts[asset] must be deleted (set to 0).
properties.assertion: post _onAuctionEnd(asset): auctionStarts[asset] == 0

properties.text: getAssetOutAmount view must return 0 for invalid auctions instead of reverting.
properties.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(view): auctionStart==0 OR expired => return 0 (no revert)

properties.text: View function must clamp amount to available balance to prevent misleading output.
properties.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(view): amount = min(amount, availableBalance)

properties.text: Feed info updates must be blocked for assets with live auctions to prevent mid-auction price source changes.
properties.assertion: forall _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset): auctionStarts[asset]!=0 OR (asset==assetOut AND live) => revert

properties.text: feeAggregator must implement IFeeAggregator interface (supportsInterface) unless set to self.
properties.assertion: forall _setFeeAggregator(addr): addr!=this AND !supportsInterface(IFeeAggregator) => revert

properties.text: Bidder-controlled callback data must not enable state manipulation between transfer-out and pull-in.
properties.assertion: forall bid with data: auctionCallback(data) executes in locked state (s_entered==true)

properties.text: Dutch auction price curve must be monotonically non-increasing over time; no price increase after decay starts.
properties.assertion: forall t1 < t2 <= duration: getAssetOutAmount(t2) <= getAssetOutAmount(t1) for same input

properties.text: performUpkeep must only start auctions for assets with usdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(start, asset): balanceUsd(asset) < minAuctionSizeUsd => revert

properties.text: performUpkeep must revert if asset params decimals are zero (not configured).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(asset): assetParams.decimals == 0 => revert AssetParamsNotSet()

properties.text: Bidders are untrusted; all bid parameters (asset, amount, data) must be fully validated before execution.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): validate(auctionLive, bidValue, balance) before any transfer

properties.text: CowSwap solvers are untrusted; GPV2CompatibleAuction.isValidSignature must validate order params fully.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash, sig): validate order against current auction state and price

properties.text: Concurrent bids draining balance must not cause later bids to transfer more than available balance.
properties.assertion: forall bid: amount <= balanceOf(asset, contract) at time of transfer

properties.text: Arbitrary deposits during live auctions must not cause assetOutAmount calculation to use inflated balance.
properties.assertion: assetOutAmount depends on bid amount and price, not contract balance (except for cap check)

properties.text: minBidUsdValue must be non-zero; prevents dust bids that waste gas or manipulate auction state.
properties.assertion: s_minBidUsdValue > 0 (enforced by _setMinBidUsdValue)

properties.text: Only assets with configured params (decimals > 0) may be evaluated for auction eligibility.
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(asset): assetParams.decimals == 0 => skip (continue)

properties.text: performUpkeep must process feeAggregator.transferForSwap before iterating eligible assets to ensure balance.
properties.assertion: transferForSwap() called before any auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp

properties.text: Asset must be allowlisted before params can be set via _applyAssetParamsUpdates.
properties.assertion: forall add in _applyAssetParamsUpdates: !allowlisted(asset) => revert AssetNotAllowlisted()

properties.text: Price computation must use 18-decimal fixed-point arithmetic consistently across all paths.
properties.assertion: all price values scaled to 1e18 before arithmetic; no mixed-decimal operations

properties.text: Removes must be processed before adds in _applyAssetParamsUpdates to prevent conflicts.
properties.assertion: forall _applyAssetParamsUpdates: removes loop completes before adds loop starts

properties.text: checkUpkeep and performUpkeep must agree: assets marked eligible by check must be processable by perform.
properties.assertion: forall asset in checkUpkeep.eligible: performUpkeep(asset) does not revert due to state mismatch

properties.text: Only assets with valid price can be eligible for auction start; stale/zero price disqualifies.
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(asset): !isPriceValid => skip (not eligible)

properties.text: Callback revert must propagate and revert entire bid() to prevent partial settlement.
properties.assertion: forall bid with callback: callback reverts => entire bid() reverts (no partial state)

properties.text: safeTransferFrom failure (bidder lacks assetOut balance/approval) must revert entire bid().
properties.assertion: forall bid: safeTransferFrom fails => entire bid() reverts atomically

properties.text: Price multiplier computation must not overflow or underflow in fixed-point arithmetic.
properties.assertion: no overflow in (start - end) * elapsed / duration; all operands within uint256 bounds

properties.text: auctionDuration must be non-zero for non-assetOut assets to prevent division by zero in price curve.
properties.assertion: forall assetParams(asset != assetOut): auctionDuration > 0 (enforced at config time)

properties.text: Price used in bid must be fetched with validation enabled (withValidation=true) to prevent zero/stale price.
properties.assertion: forall bid: _getAssetPrice(asset, true) used; zero or stale => revert

properties.text: Removes in _applyFeedInfoUpdates must revert if asset is not currently allowlisted.
properties.assertion: forall remove(asset): s_allowlistedAssets.remove(asset)==false => revert AssetNotAllowlisted

properties.text: Each dataStreamsFeedId must map to exactly one asset; feed ID rotation must preserve price source for previous asset.
properties.assertion: forall feedId: |{a : feedIdToAsset[feedId]==a}| <= 1; rotation requires fallback for old asset

properties.text: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed; fallback only when streams price is stale AND feed configured.
properties.assertion: price = streams.price if fresh; else dataFeed.price if configured AND more recent; else streams.price

properties.text: All returned prices must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals regardless of source (streams or feed).
properties.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice: returned price is in 1e18 units

properties.text: Stale price data (beyond stalenessThreshold) must revert when validation enabled; prevents unfavorable trades.
properties.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice(withValidation=true): updatedAt < now - threshold => revert StaleFeedData

properties.text: Zero price must revert when validation enabled to prevent division by zero or free asset acquisition.
properties.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice(withValidation=true): price == 0 => revert ZeroFeedData()

properties.text: VerifierProxy is trusted external boundary; verifyBulk results are assumed authentic.
properties.assertion: verifierProxy.verifyBulk() returns authentic verified reports (external trust assumption)

properties.text: transmit() must reject empty unverifiedReports array to prevent no-op calls.
properties.assertion: forall transmit(reports): reports.length == 0 => revert EmptyList()

properties.text: All dataStreamsFeedIds must be allowlisted before bulk verification to prevent processing rogue feeds.
properties.assertion: forall transmit: feedIdToAsset[feedId]==0 => revert FeedNotAllowlisted before verifyBulk

properties.text: transmit must validate price is non-zero after conversion; zero price stored would corrupt auction pricing.
properties.assertion: forall transmit(report): usdPrice == 0 after scaling => revert ZeroFeedData()

properties.text: transmit must reject stale reports (observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold).
properties.assertion: forall transmit(report): obsTimestamp < now - staleness => revert StaleFeedData()

properties.text: dataStreamsFeedId version must be exactly 3; other versions rejected to prevent format misparse.
properties.assertion: forall _applyFeedInfoUpdates(add): feedId.version != 3 => revert InvalidFeedVersion

properties.text: Old feed ID mappings and stale price data must be cleaned up on feed update to prevent ghost entries.
properties.assertion: forall feedUpdate(old!=new): delete feedIdToAsset[old], delete dataStreamsPrice[old.asset]

properties.text: Most recent timestamp wins between streams and feed fallback; stale source never overrides fresh source.
properties.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice: use dataFeed only if dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt

properties.text: verifierProxy must be non-zero and immutable after construction; prevents price verification bypass.
properties.assertion: i_streamsVerifierProxy != address(0) AND immutable post-construction

properties.text: Declared unverifiedReports count must match verifiedReports count from verifierProxy for consistent iteration.
properties.assertion: len(verifiedReports) == len(unverifiedReports); mismatch => index OOB or silent truncation
